description: Repo-root node_modules for the Curio sandbox's Node.js subprocess. The Autark grammar's data section is compiled to autk-db JavaScript and executed server-side via @urban-toolkit/autk-db (see utk_curio/sandbox/app/worker.py execute_js_code). Pinned to match the frontend's autk-db version so backend data loading behaves identically. compute/map/plot stay browser-side (WebGPU/DOM) and are not needed here.
